description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with clean lines and a flat, elongated layout. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, each with a flat or gently sloped roof, separated by a central open area that includes a swimming pool. Large glass windows and sliding doors line the longer facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor patio and pool. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, with landscaped green areas and paved walkways surrounding the building. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and muted earth tones, with contrasting roof colors and minimal decorative elements. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing functionality and open living spaces.
description: A modern, elongated bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, a central pool, and minimalist landscaping enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entrance, central pool, and both building volumes with their flat roofs and surrounding green areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow end of the property, the perimeter wall, and the transition between the two main building volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long facade with extensive glass windows and sliding doors, as well as the pool and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary entrance, the flat roof sections, and the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
